35.reason: [The heightTree function assumes the tree is traversed from root to node p, but it modifies the pointer 's' which is passed by value. Also, if 'root' is NULL (empty tree), calling heightTree(root, t) leads to undefined behavior. Moreover, the logic for computing height is flawed鈥攊t doesn't correctly compute the depth of node 'p' in the tree.]
